response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience with exposure to event-driven architectures and AI-agent tooling, but lacks explicit executive leadership in agentic AI or fintech infrastructure. His background is more aligned with senior engineering roles rather than CTO-level responsibilities in regulated, high-stakes environments.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems, including low-latency microservices and real-time data processing.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators at Naver) and open-source projects with modular design principles.
Proven track record in scaling engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, observability) and cross-functional tooling across multiple industries.
concerns: No explicit experience leading multi-agent AI systems in production for regulated fintech or high-stakes environments.
Lacks demonstrated executive leadership in scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Fintech experience is limited to indirect exposure (e.g., RIDE Capital) rather than core infrastructure like credit systems or real-time risk modeling.
